sections.paragraph:
in pause טָֽבְאַל (“the goodness of God,” or, “God is good.” Syriac form for טֹובְאֵל comp. טַבְרִמֹּון, טֹובִיָּה), [Tabeal, Tabeel], pr.n. Syriac-

(1) of an unknown person, whose son the Syrians and Ephraimites intended to place on the throne of Jerusalem, Isa 7:6. See my Commentary on this place.-(2) of a Persian governor in Samaria, Ezr 4:7.
